name: Word–Character Link Index
description: Cross-index linking words to their component characters, and characters back to words. Enables word-first learning with character-level visual support and SRS routing.

conventions.word_id: Should match entries in p1_words.json and p2_words.json (or your internal word list).
conventions.character_id: Should match entries in characters_1200.json (or your internal character list).
conventions.strength: 0.0–1.0, how important the character is for the word's meaning/recognition

character_review_triggers: If a word is repeatedly failed and a specific character within it is repeatedly misrecognized, schedule that character as a support item.
If handwriting mode is enabled, schedule component/radical drills for the most errorful character components.
